message:
fix: guard against zero window_size in anomaly detection, decompose Asupersync/telemetry issue tracker

Bug fix:
- ecosystem_reputation.rs: add window_size == 0 guard to
  is_anomalous_delta() to prevent division-by-zero or meaningless
  anomaly checks when the window size is zero — now returns false
  (non-anomalous) early alongside the existing history.len() < 2 check

Issue tracker updates:
- Refine descriptions for bd-1now parent and sub-tasks to reference
  completed work (bd-1now.2 tokio removal)
- Decompose bd-1now.3 (Tokio guardrail) into .3.1 (drift checker) and
  .3.2 (proof harness)
- Decompose bd-1now.4 (telemetry) into .4.6 (orchestration scripts),
  .4.7 (throughput characterization), .4.8 (operator troubleshooting)
- Decompose bd-1now.5 (semantic boundaries) into .5.1 (inventory twins),
  .5.2 (anti-drift safeguards), .5.3 (proof harness)
- Add bd-1now.8 (Asupersync verification gate)
- Add bd-2sp5 (closed: payload-input hash collision fix)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
